payload.answer: Inspection was requested for memory mem_123. No stored content or metadata for that memory was provided in the fixture, so there is nothing further to inspect. No memory was created, updated, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input references a memory ID (mem_123) but provides no underlying memory record to resolve or inspect.

details: Treated as a read-only inspection request.
No durable memory write was attempted.
No inspectable memory payload was available in the provided input.

repair_options: Provide the stored contents or metadata for mem_123 so it can be inspected.
Run the inspect command against a live memory store that contains mem_123.
Verify that mem_123 is a valid memory ID if the record was expected to exist.
